subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of Bahá! Thy recent letter hath arrived, and from its contents it became evident that thou art sorrowful and dejected [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه البهاء نامه اخیر رسید و از مضمون معلوم گردید که محزونی و افسرده و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @growth of the Cause
